title: Callista sanguinolenta
taxonomy: Callista sanguinolenta is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Veneridae. The classification of Callista sanguinolenta includes the domain Eukarya, kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Veneroida. It is a type of bivalve, also known as a clam.
